title: uragoga elliptica
intro: Uragoga elliptica, also known as the Uragoga plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The Uragoga plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infections. Uragoga elliptica can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in various traditional remedies.
